Realms are like basic play styles.
You can do just one or mix with 1 other realm.
Aequor (Blue), Focuses on end of turn, passive tentacle damage. Has a stance system (Regular, Aggressive, and Defensive) you can switch per turn. Has some of the best Standard units
Caro(Red): Focuses on life gain or lifedrain strategies. Each Exalt (or unit ultimate) has an unique Devour effect based on holding onto an Embryo card, which can be used to gain energy as well. They have a passive heal per turn in the red circle called the Crimson Furnace used to gain HP for their abilities. The red bar with the percentage is the Embryo meter and after it hits 100% per turn, it gives you 1 Embryo card you can hang onto until needed.
Chaos (Yellow): The units here have strong Death Resistance (aka getting to 1 HP instead of losing) and Keyflare generation (Or Your Ultimate Bar filling for Posses). They're typically the generic can mix with other realms units.
Ultra (Purple): One of the technically difficult realms if you're not used to card games. All of their units work on first card played per turn effects, which puts it in the top 5 boxes. Once the 5 boxes are filled (not including specific effects that add more cards to the boxes), you get a free extra turn over the enemies. On the top left, there's a purple circle with the mechanic called Annihilation, which gets rid of the leftmost card there in exchange for 1 Insight card.

Weekly: The weekly boss fights. You do this every week, always choose the highest level you can do in order to get max resources for character leveling and progression. To resume things, there are 4 realms, i tried to tell the main points of each realm, you can try to play depending of your liking, you can even mix them but only for a max of 2 realms mix:

Chaos realm (yellow) is mainly for supporting other realms but you can also spam the small thing you'll see soon at the bottom left corner of your screen during battle (only if you go yellow character only) .

Aequor realm (blue) is quite good for newbies in case they lack defense or attacks, just click on the tentacle icon and switch the mode of the tentacle:
- white tentacle gives shields but reduce tentacle dmg
- red tentacle gives more dmg but lose 1 tentacle limit at the end of the turn

Caro realm (red) became more friendly with the recent buff, you have to be careful tho, you use your health in exchange of more dmg, a lot of dps in that realm have more dmg after reaching a low hp threshold. You can also heal youself by the amount of the red orb by clicking on it.

Ultra realm (purple) a bit hard to setup because it require you 5 turns to setup for a nuke turn, each 1st card played get copied into a ultra bar and when it get filled you enter the ultra turn thing where all of those copied cards can be played. You can also discard those card to get 1 insight by clicking on the purple button.

Maybe it would be better to let you taste the realm + characters kit design from trial
